raw_export.provisional_count_correction: An earlier provisional manual reading of 43 was incorrect. The search page displays 40 items and the raw export contains 40 unique ECRef rows.

included: The raw Electoral Commission regulated-donee donations CSV export for entity Mr Jeremy Corbyn MP (entity ID 1600)
Electoral Commission guidance defining regulated donees and monthly reporting
excluded: Political-party donations, campaign spending, loans, public funds and company receipts
Parliament register gifts, visits and company roles already captured elsewhere
Crowdfunding lists, party, campaign or personal websites, media, social media, Wikipedia and commercial databases
Donor-name-only joins and inference about personal benefit, influence, motive, legality, propriety or political significance

sources.title: Electoral Commission regulated-donee donations export — Jeremy Corbyn
sources.limitations: Raw UTF-8 CSV export captured from the Electoral Commission search. The export contains 40 unique ECRef rows and 29 columns. The raw CSV is not committed under this five-file lane; every field is preserved verbatim in the machine-readable packet. The mechanical total includes one returned impermissible-donor record and one returned unidentified-donor record.

sources.title: Donations and loans to regulated organisations and individuals
sources.limitations: Defines regulated donees and monthly reporting. It does not establish the content of any Jeremy Corbyn row; row data comes only from the official export.

facts.statement: The Electoral Commission export records visit record V0833967 for Mr Jeremy Corbyn MP, valued at £4,346.59, from donor World Network, accepted on 12 October 2025. The recorded purpose is Keynote Address at the Kuala Lumpur Conference on a New Just and Humane International Order.
facts.notes: Electoral Commission ECRef V0833967. Regulated donee type: MP - Member of Parliament. Donor status: Other. Reported date: 31/10/2025. Reporting period: November 2025. The exact 29-column raw field map is preserved in the source packet. No inference about personal benefit, influence, motive, legality or propriety is made.

coverage_gaps.summary: The Electoral Commission regulated-donee donation export for Jeremy Corbyn has been captured, but loans, party and entity finance, campaign spending, reporting-threshold effects, records outside the Commission database and any unresolved identity variants remain outside this lane.
coverage_gaps.next_action: Open separately authorised lanes for regulated-donee loans, party/entity finance, campaign spending and threshold or archival coverage if a broader political-finance history is required.
coverage_gaps.notes: The mechanical export total is a capture check only. It includes returned impermissible and unidentified donor records and is not presented as money retained.

decisions.notes: All 40 official export rows are encoded one-to-one. No row is removed, combined or reclassified. Returned impermissible and unidentified donor records remain explicitly marked as returned.
